blueprints.name: Directory
blueprints.title: Directory Website
blueprints.summary: Standard Next.js directory site with categories, search, submissions, and SEO defaults — the flagship Work shape.

blueprints.name: Directory (Minimal)
blueprints.title: Minimal Directory Website
blueprints.summary: Lightweight Astro directory for fast, content-first listings with minimal moving parts and a small build footprint.

blueprints.name: Marketing Site
blueprints.title: Marketing Website
blueprints.summary: Next.js marketing site with a landing page, feature sections, and content pages for launching a product or brand.

blueprints.name: Company
blueprints.title: Company Website
blueprints.summary: An AI-staffed company site backed by an organization roster — teams, roles, and an about surface. Placeholder until the Company builder ships.

blueprints.name: Store
blueprints.title: eCommerce Store
blueprints.summary: An online store with a product catalog, cart, and checkout surface. Placeholder until the Store builder ships.

blueprints.name: Blog
blueprints.title: Blog Website
blueprints.summary: A content-first blog with posts, tags, and an author surface. Placeholder until the Blog builder ships.

blueprints.name: Landing Page
blueprints.title: Landing Page
blueprints.summary: A single-page, conversion-focused landing site with a hero, sections, and a call to action. Placeholder until the Landing builder ships.

blueprints.name: Awesome List
blueprints.title: Awesome List Website
blueprints.summary: A curated awesome-list site — grouped links, categories, and search over a hand-picked collection. Placeholder until the Awesome builder ships.
